name: wyrmvault-root
description: Wyrmvault Cooperative Cipher-Dungeon Game Root Workspace

scripts.start: node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); spawn('npm', ['run', 'start', '--prefix', 'backend'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev', '--prefix', 'ancient-letters'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
scripts.dev: node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev', '--prefix', 'backend'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev', '--prefix', 'ancient-letters'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix ancient-letters
